title: Cricket’s House on Jaya
description: The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Luffy, Bellamy. The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: When day suddenly turns into night.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: But let's leave that aside for now.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: In any case, the suddenly occurring "night,"

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And when those appear in the sky,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: They block even the sunlight out,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Changing day on land to night.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: You're free to believe it or not.

summary: The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.
